description: Vertical designed poster headlined 'Working Family TAX CUT.' The top portion is a color photograph of a crowd; in the foreground a woman holds up a toddler wearing a gray T-shirt reading 'american babe,' and a man in a white hard hat (the name 'SHAFFER' is visible) stands at right; the woman and the man are smiling, and a partly visible sign reads 'THANK YOU PRESIDENT...'. A dark blue gradient overlays the lower two-thirds. The title is set in white type ('Working Family' in italic serif, 'TAX CUT' in large bold serif capitals). Below is a list with white checkmark icons: 'INCREASES TAKE-HOME PAY BY OVER $10,000 ANNUALLY,' 'CREATES NEARLY ONE MILLION NEW JOBS & PROTECTS 6.1 MILLION FULL-TIME JOBS,' 'ELIMINATES TAXES ON TIPS & OVERTIME,' 'INSTITUTES PERMANENT PAID LEAVE TAX CREDIT TO SUPPORT WORKING FAMILIES,' and 'CUTS TAXES BY 15% ON AVERAGE FOR HARDWORKING AMERICANS.' A small White House seal is at the bottom. The palette is navy and white.
notable_text: Working Family TAX CUT / INCREASES TAKE-HOME PAY BY OVER $10,000 ANNUALLY / ELIMINATES TAXES ON TIPS & OVERTIME / CUTS TAXES BY 15% ON AVERAGE FOR HARDWORKING AMERICANS
